sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 85

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 85:1
items.html:
(to the question) Ibur of nine and of seven months
In interiority, even the first Ibur is nine months, for NHY are incorporated in HGT, and HGT in HBD — thus nine discernments. And the second Ibur, of the Mochin, in interiority, is drawn from the discernment of Atik — that is, the seven lower ones of Atik that are clothed in the Galgalta of AA [Arich Anpin]. And since there is no attainment in the Hesed of Atik, there are only six months here — that is, seven incomplete months. (Items 26 and 28)
